note: Mathlib/Combinatorics/SetFamily/Shatter.lean:186 `def vcDim (𝒜 : Finset (Finset α)) : ℕ := 𝒜.shatterer.sup card` — the Vapnik-Chervonenkis dimension of a set family, docstring in the file explicitly names it 'The Vapnik-Chervonenkis dimension.'

Mathlib/Data/Finite/Defs.lean:185 `protected def Finite (s : Set α) : Prop := Finite s` (in namespace Set) — docstring: 'A set is finite if the corresponding Subtype is finite, i.e., if there exists a natural n : ℕ and an equivalence s ≃ Fin n.' Direct formalization of 'finite set'.
